sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Now I see the pattern:
- Clicking left box: charcoal shape moves to rows 16-19, cols 6-9 (left panel)
- Preview boxes swap: left becomes blue-bordered, right becomes gray-bordered
- The buttons in the left panel changed from black to gray (rows 47, cols 8 and 13)
So the charcoal shape cycles through positions when clicking the preview boxes:
1. Initial: rows 16-19, cols 22-25 (right side of left panel)
2. After clicking left box: rows 16-19, cols 6-9 (left side of left panel)
3. After clicking right box: rows 8-11, cols 14-17 (middle of left panel)
4. After clicking left box again: rows 16-19, cols 6-9 (back to left side)
Wait, let me track this more carefully:
- Start: shape at cols 22-25
- Click left (blue): shape moves to cols 6-9
- Click right (gray→blue): shape moves to cols 14-17
- Click left (gray→blue): shape moves to cols 6-9
Hmm, the shape seems to move between different positions based on which box is clicked. The positions seem to cycle through:
- cols 6-9 (left)
- cols 14-17 (center)
- cols 22-25 (right)
Now I need to figure out what the goal is. Looking at the right panel, there's a yellow L-shape at rows 7-11 and a yellow square at rows 24-27. Maybe the goal is to move the charcoal shape to align with one of these yellow objects.
The charcoal shape is 14 pixels (4x4 with some missing). The yellow L-shape is 16 pixels. The yellow square is 14 pixels.
The charcoal shape at rows 16-19, cols 6-9 is 4x4 = 16 cells but only 14 pixels (2 missing).
The yellow square at rows 24-27, cols 45-48 is also 14 pixels.
Maybe the goal is to match the shape's position with a target position. Let me look at the right panel's yellow objects more carefully.
The yellow L-shape is at rows 7-11, cols 44-49 (6x5 area).
The yellow square is at rows 24-27, cols 45-48 (4x4 area, 14 pixels).
The charcoal shape in the left panel is at rows 16-19, cols 6-9 (4x4 area, 14 pixels).
If the goal is to match positions, maybe I need to move the charcoal shape to the same relative position as the yellow square in the right panel.
The yellow square is at rows 24-27 in the right panel. The charcoal shape is currently at rows 16-19.
Let me try clicking the right box to see if the shape moves to rows 24-27.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Click the right (gray-bordered) preview box to move the shape
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 57, 'col': 20}])

print(f"Level completed: {last_action_result.get('level_completed', False)}")

# Check current shape positions
seg = current_frame.segmentation
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'c' and 10 <= n['pixels'] <= 20:
        b = n['boundary']
        r1, r2 = min(r for r,c in b), max(r for r,c in b)
        c1, c2 = min(c for r,c in b), max(c for r,c in b)
        if c2 < 27:
            print(f"  LEFT c shape: rows {r1}-{r2}, cols {c1}-{c2}, pixels={n['pixels']}")

# Check preview box borders
lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
print(f"Preview box row 54: {lines[54][5:26]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
